summary: Lead accepts M7-HISTORICAL-CULTURAL-LANGUAGE-REVIEW-001 after independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The accepted artifact is a review-gate baseline for historical claims, cultural representations, language/name/title/symbol rules, uncertainty labels, violence-cost handling, and Human Gate routing. This is not formal content lock acceptance.

tests_run.result: VALID task in REVIEW before lead acceptance; task updated to ACCEPTED after QA accept.
Passed; M7 baseline remains review-gate-only and is not compiled as formal content.

decisions: ACCEPT independent QA verdict and move task to ACCEPTED pending PR integration.
Do not treat the baseline as formal content lock acceptance; M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains a future Human Gate.
Preserve M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE exactly.
Keep M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 unstarted until this accepted R4 task is integrated and closed.
risks: This acceptance covers review gates only; later scenario/person/event, art/audio/localization, culture review, manual playthrough, and formal content lock still require their own tasks and gates.
Unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains outside task scope and must not be staged.
requested_action: Push branch, open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, sync, close the task, and continue to the next dependency-ready M7 task.
